title: Brachypodium tenue

taxonomy: Brachypodium tenue belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This classification places it within the monogeneric genus Brachypodium. The species is further categorized as a monocot, with a single cotyledon in its seedling stage. As a member of the Poaceae family, Brachypodium tenue exhibits characteristics typical of grasses, such as a seed head composed of spikelets. Its classification is also consistent with its growth habit as a perennial or annual grass.
